title: Carrit SMP Season 4 Modpack
description: The Modpack for the Fourth Season of the Carrit SMP.
body:
**The Modpack for the Fourth Season of the Carrit SMP.**

![Members of the third season of the Carrit SMP ready to fight the ender dragon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb93393d379dc31d8dcaf00ec13a5815ed8e0c70_0.webp)

This pack was put together on a random afternoon for the fourth season of the Carrit SMP. Probably not the best idea to download it if you are neither a member of the SMP or [the Discord Server](https://discord.gg/h6W5W23BX8), to be honest. The Server is invite-only.

This pack is best played without shaders because of optimisation mods and other mods that don't run very well when shaderpacks are enabled.
